official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing a known CustomPacketPayload fixture for Play clientbound custom_payload.
Official binary source for the minecraft:brand custom payload body bytes inside custom_payload.
Official binary source for constructing a Play clientbound custom_payload packet fixture.

field_notes.brand: The official packet uses BrandPayload as the smallest known CustomPacketPayload supported by ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket.GAMEPLAY_STREAM_CODEC; the generated answer owns the resulting payload id and bytes.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound custom_payload packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official BrandPayload fixture only; do not infer arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
